case_title: STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY et al vs. PORTELLO, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY KERTZMAN, WENDY AS TO DEFENDANT PORTELLO, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-07-1995

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY KERTZMAN, WENDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTELLO, ROBERT $3,403.76 PRINCIPAL, $377.25 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,896.01
